title: More Kittens
description: This mod makes a cat litter more realistic, by instead of breeding only 1 kitten, it can vary between 3 to 5 kittens
body:
# More Kittens

More Kittens is a lightweight Minecraft Java Edition Fabric mod that makes cat breeding more realistic.

Instead of cats always having a single kitten, breeding two cats now creates a randomized litter of 3–5 kittens. The mod keeps vanilla Minecraft gameplay intact while making animal breeding feel more natural and immersive.

Designed for players who want simple vanilla+ improvements without adding unnecessary features, blocks, items, or complicated mechanics.

## Features

* Realistic cat litters
* Cats produce 3–5 kittens randomly
* Lightweight and optimized
* Multiplayer and server compatible
* Vanilla-friendly gameplay
* No new items or blocks
* Works with Fabric
* Perfect for survival, roleplay, animal, and cozy Minecraft modpacks

## Compatibility

* Minecraft Java Edition 26.1.1 Tiny Takeover
* Fabric Loader
* Singleplayer and multiplayer servers

If you are looking for:

* realistic Minecraft animal breeding
* better cat breeding mods
* vanilla+ Minecraft mods
* immersive Minecraft pet mods
* Fabric animal mods
* Minecraft kitten mod

then More Kittens fits directly into your world without changing the core Minecraft experience.
